trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: introduce D1-backed mentor meeting persistence with scope enforcement and audit logging so mentor workflow can move beyond alpha-only state.
scope: Add a mentor_meetings table migration and an authenticated /api/mentor/meetings endpoint to record/list mentor meeting outcomes, enforcing mentor-assignment scope and writing audit_events; cover unauthorized, forbidden, and happy-path behavior via integration tests; update the MVP requirements catalog and run log with the new evidence.
changes: Added migrations/0004_mentor_meetings.sql introducing a mentor_meetings table for meeting outcomes and notes.

Added functions/api/mentor/meetings.ts implementing GET/POST handlers for mentors to list and record meeting outcomes, enforcing active mentor_assignments scope and writing audit_events for both denied and successful attempts.

Added tests/mentor-meetings.integration.test.mjs covering unauthorized access, mentor-role enforcement, assignment-scope denial with audit logging, successful meeting creation with audit logging, and mentor list retrieval.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md to record MVP-017 progress and evidence, and added this structured run manifest.
known_limits: This run only adds meeting persistence and audit; presentation-slot conflict checks, outline approval gates, and check-out/check-in state remain unimplemented.
No UI integration was added; the new endpoint is intended for follow-on wiring into the mentor workflow surfaces and smoke pages.
next_actions: Add presentation_slots schema and mentor endpoints to schedule/check conflicts and enforce check-out/check-in state with audit events.
Wire mentor meeting recording into the mentor UI surface (alpha or authenticated mentor workspace) with clear loading/error/permission states.
